label: Job giver wander
description: Abstract base for wander job givers. Provides wander radius, locomotion, danger tolerance, and timing. Covers JobGiver_WanderNearDutyLocation and subclasses.

wanderRadius.label: Wander radius
wanderRadius.description: Radius in cells within which the pawn wanders around the wander root.

ticksBetweenWandersRange.label: Ticks between wanders range
ticksBetweenWandersRange.description: Random range in ticks for the wait pause between wander moves.

locomotionUrgency.label: Locomotion urgency
locomotionUrgency.description: Speed at which the pawn moves during wander goto jobs.

locomotionUrgencyOutsideRadius.label: Locomotion urgency outside radius
locomotionUrgencyOutsideRadius.description: Speed override used when the pawn is outside the wander radius and needs to return. Absent means same as locomotionUrgency.

maxDanger.label: Max danger
maxDanger.description: Maximum danger level of a wander destination cell the pawn will accept.

expiryInterval.label: Expiry interval
expiryInterval.description: Ticks before the issued wander job expires. -1 means never expires.

canBashDoors.label: Can bash doors
canBashDoors.description: If true, the pawn may bash doors when wandering.

expireOnNearbyEnemy.label: Expire on nearby enemy
expireOnNearbyEnemy.description: If true, the wander job expires quickly when an enemy is nearby so the pawn can react.

canEatMealsFromInventory.label: Can eat meals from inventory
canEatMealsFromInventory.description: If true, the pawn may eat carried meals while wandering.
